text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see... That must have been rough... Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm glad to hear that... Yes... Take care...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Took a while, but at least she's feeling
better now...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's late. I should head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe seems exhausted after talking to
someone (or something) night after night.
